summary: Organizer as Participant Feature - All 12 tests PASSED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (organizer_participant_id, organizer_invitation_token, organizer_checkout_url in response, is_organizer=true, role='organizer', no duplicate organizer, check-in creates evidence, physical without meeting_provider works, video with meet works). Frontend: 4/4 tests passed (organizer check-in section visible, check-in button/status visible, organizer badge visible, resend button hidden for organizer). Fixed missing DollarSign import in AppointmentDetail.js.
passed_tests: TEST 1: POST /api/appointments/ → response contains organizer_participant_id and organizer_invitation_token ✓
TEST 2: POST /api/appointments/ → response contains organizer_checkout_url when penalty_amount > 0 ✓
TEST 3: GET /api/participants/?appointment_id={id} → returns organizer with is_organizer=true and role='organizer' ✓
TEST 4: Organizer email not duplicated when added as participant (same email skipped) ✓
TEST 5: POST /api/checkin/manual with organizer's invitation_token → creates evidence_item ✓
TEST 6: Physical appointment without meeting_provider → works (non-regression) ✓
TEST 7: Video appointment with meeting_provider='meet' → works with organizer auto-injected ✓
TEST 8: Frontend - 'Mon check-in (organisateur)' section visible when organizer is accepted_guaranteed ✓
TEST 9: Frontend - Check-in button or 'Check-in enregistré' status visible ✓
TEST 10: Frontend - 'Organisateur' badge visible in participants list ✓
TEST 11: Frontend - 'Garantie organisateur requise' section visible when status is accepted_pending_guarantee ✓
TEST 12: Frontend - Resend invitation button NOT shown for organizer ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing DollarSign import in AppointmentDetail.js line 5 - was causing runtime error when viewing appointments with pending organizer guarantee
Backend organizer injection at appointments.py lines 134-192 correctly creates organizer participant with is_organizer=true, role='organizer', status='accepted_pending_guarantee'
Backend correctly skips duplicate organizer email at line 199-200
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly detects organizer participant at lines 74-83 and shows appropriate UI sections
Frontend correctly hides resend button for organizer at line 1271 with condition !participant.is_organizer
seed_data_creation: Used existing test appointment 8f3572cb-11b9-4b51-a659-f187cbd633ee with organizer in accepted_guaranteed status. Created new test appointments during backend tests with organizer in accepted_pending_guarantee status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Organizer as participant feature fully tested. Key points: 1) Organizer is auto-injected as participant with is_organizer=true, role='organizer' on appointment creation, 2) Organizer starts with status 'accepted_pending_guarantee' and needs Stripe checkout when penalty_amount > 0, 3) Organizer's own email is skipped if added to participants list (no duplicate), 4) Frontend shows 'Garantie organisateur requise' section when organizer status is accepted_pending_guarantee, 5) Frontend shows 'Mon check-in (organisateur)' section when organizer status is accepted_guaranteed, 6) Organizer badge visible in participants list, 7) Resend button hidden for organizer. Test appointments: 8f3572cb (organizer guaranteed), 35505a73 (organizer pending guarantee).

bug_fixed.fix: Added DollarSign to the import statement
bug_fixed.impact: Was causing runtime error 'DollarSign is not defined' when viewing appointments with pending organizer guarantee
